summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PIR Grain & Pulses refactored backend. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified - login, dashboard KPIs, trades list, counterparties, vessels, settings, new trade form, trade detail, calendar, and notifications dropdown all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with salih.karagoz/salih123 returns 200 with token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with pir.accounts/pir123 returns 200 with token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns current user without password
Backend: GET /api/trades returns list of trades
Backend: GET /api/trades/stats/overview returns KPI stats (totalTrades, activeTrades, pendingTrades, completedTrades, completionRate, statusDistribution)
Backend: POST /api/trades creates new trade with referenceNumber
Backend: GET /api/trades/{id} returns specific trade
Backend: PUT /api/trades/{id} updates trade
Backend: DELETE /api/trades/{id} deletes trade
Backend: GET /api/partners returns list of counterparties
Backend: POST /api/partners creates new partner
Backend: GET /api/partners/{id} returns specific partner
Backend: GET /api/vessels returns list of vessels
Backend: POST /api/vessels creates new vessel
Backend: GET /api/commodities returns list
Backend: GET /api/ports returns list
Backend: GET /api/origins returns list
Backend: GET /api/surveyors returns list
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list
Backend: GET /api/events returns list
Backend: POST /api/events creates new event
Backend: GET /api/users returns list without passwords
Backend: GET /api/trade-statuses returns status list
Backend: Unauthorized access to /api/trades returns 401
Backend: Unauthorized access to /api/partners returns 401
Backend: Unauthorized access to /api/vessels returns 401
Frontend: Login page loads with PIR GRAIN & PULSES branding and credentials hint
Frontend: Login with salih.karagoz/salih123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows KPI cards (Upcoming Events: 3, Completed Trades: 0, Active Trades: 5, Pending Trades: 5)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Upcoming Events section with events
Frontend: Dashboard shows Trade Progress section
Frontend: Trades page loads with Ongoing Contracts (5) and Pending Contracts (5) tables
Frontend: Trades page has New Trade button
Frontend: Counterparties page loads with All (175), Sellers (78), Buyers (95), Co-Brokers (2) tabs
Frontend: Vessels page loads with 194 Total Vessels, 35 yrs Average Age, 24 Unique Flags
Frontend: Settings page loads with profile info and tabs (Commodities, Origins, Loading Ports, Discharge Ports, Surveyors, Users)
Frontend: Settings page shows Commodities (20) list

Frontend: New Trade page loads with all required fields (Seller, Buyer, Broker, Co-Broker, Commodity, Origin, Quantity, Tolerance, Price per MT, Currency, Delivery Term, Payment Terms, Brokerage, Contract Date)
Frontend: Trade Detail page loads with tabs (Confirmation, Shipment Details, Parties & Agents, Documents)
Frontend: Trade Detail page shows Contract Information and Trade Terms
Frontend: Calendar page loads with monthly view and events
Frontend: Calendar shows events (Meeting with AgroTrade, Payment Due, GAFTA Conference)
Frontend: Notifications dropdown opens and displays correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular structure is complete and all endpoints work identically
All route modules properly import from shared database.py, auth.py, models.py, and config.py
serialize_doc function correctly handles MongoDB ObjectId conversion
Authentication middleware (get_current_user) properly protects all endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete and verified. All API endpoints work identically after refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular structure (config.py, database.py, auth.py, models.py, seed.py, routes/). Frontend unchanged and fully functional. Database: pir_grain_pulses. Test credentials: salih.karagoz/salih123 (admin), pir.accounts/pir123 (accountant).

features_verified.login: Working with both admin and accountant credentials
features_verified.dashboard: KPI cards showing correct stats from /api/trades/stats/overview
features_verified.trades_page: Lists trades from /api/trades with Ongoing and Pending sections
features_verified.counterparties_page: Lists partners from /api/partners with type filters
features_verified.settings_page: Loads commodities, ports, origins, surveyors, users from respective endpoints
